title: Give locals jobs, involve them in conservation: Supreme Court on how to tackle illegal sand mining in Chambal sanctuary
description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday passed a slew of directions to the States of Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh to curb illegal sand mining in the National Chambal Sanctuary area.Besides measures to strengthen law enforcement and surveillance, the Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta also acknowledged the economical factors which compel people to break the law.Hence, it directed that the three States shall prioritise employment opportunities for local youth and economically vuln
